expectations.text: Shows using stdin pipe: echo '...' | colab exec for inline code
Mentions there is no -c flag for colab exec
expectations.evidence: Line 4: "colab exec has no -c flag (the skill explicitly calls this out as gotcha #12)"

expectations.text: Notes this approach avoids creating any files
expectations.evidence: The stdin approach inherently avoids files, but the output never explicitly states this. The user specifically asked for no files/upload — the answer should confirm this property.
